name: OpenBayes
description: Chinese cloud ML platform offering GPU containers, AutoML, dataset hub and model serving for AI + HPC workloads.

seo.title: OpenBayes — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: OpenBayes: Chinese cloud ML platform offering GPU containers, AutoML, dataset hub and model serving for AI + HPC workloads.

when_to_use: Renting GPU cloud for ML training and inference in China
Running Jupyter notebooks on high-performance GPU instances
Deploying open-source LLMs on managed GPU infrastructure
Accessing H100/A100 capacity for deep learning experiments

pros: On-demand GPU containers in mainland China
AutoML features for tabular and vision tasks
Lower GPU pricing than AWS cn-regions
cons: Docs and UI mostly in Simplified Chinese
Ecosystem lags AWS/GCP on managed services
review.verdict: Pragmatic Chinese GPU cloud for domestic AI work; foreign teams will find onboarding and support challenging.
review.best_for: Chinese AI teams needing GPU capacity inside mainland regions
review.not_for: International teams with hyperscaler compliance requirements

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
